name: multi-ai-review-agent
description: Adversarial multi-AI peer review of a code change via the Cursor agent CLI across diverse model families, synthesized into one deterministic Markdown report.

interface.shortDescription: Cross-model peer review for code changes
interface.longDescription: Run diverse Cursor agent model families against a branch diff, synthesize their findings, and ground-truth actionable recommendations before merging.
defaultPrompt: Use multi-ai-review-agent to review my current branch.
Use multi-ai-review-agent to review this change with several model families.
